TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Quri_gaya_mdkrang, title = Quri_gaya_mdkrang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quri_gaya_mdkrang} }

S.FORM: Quri gaya mdkrang ŚĖ™Á¶ģŤ¶ŹŚČá Gaya quri mdkrang(mangal tunux pais) pusu balay o stndahu ka nii. Pusu seusa mdkrang ŚáļŤćČÁöĄŚéüŚõ† Pusu seusa mdkrang o (1)smiyuk pkpeysan rudan, kiya ka hnici kari rudan ni asi ka daan,(2)kksnaw balay, kiya o tteumal qmpringan dmbbrax ni pptasan pnglux dsnaw nii,(3).pnrungan kari, kiyao paah snhangan taxa saw nii, (4).msneiying bais stmaaun,(5) lmiwaq mnarux meeru aji ksbaan tnukuy aangal lala uqun, (6)euda hakaw utux babaw mhuqil. musa mdkrang(brah 100 sngari hngkawas miyah ka Nihung do wada laxan ka gaya nii). Gaya mdkrang ŚáļŤćČÁöĄŤ¶ŹŚČá Taxa bi hiyi duma(saw skSita Duku), mthbaraw musa ka kana, mdudul o mrhug alang aji o mduuy qsiya alang hiya psramal.(mdakar mseusa,marah tahut, tmikan ni hmlama dsun) musa bbuyu mspi ni psisil mn3, malu o musa, naqih o embrinah, muda mkrabi elug siida o "prgnabaw," mgrbu kjiyax pdaling alang peysan do hciyun biyi ka 1 risaw ni smkagul empskeuruy,nii o asi ka mnangal tunux pais,(mlukus"srbuxan)" bsqaran puniq,buun buji aji uri o smbrangan ka pais, snagan ayug ka luqi ni psaun "tneetu "ka tunux ni speapa risaw,"mkeelug muyas mkleeug hmdhik"ni msqar puniq quri alang (pxal o 1 tunux,mn3 o 3 tunux pais nangal, ini dhuq alang ka dhiya na o saan pstrung plukus"srbuxan"kulaw elug ka mnangal tunux, pdalih alang do mneelug mqaras muyas mkleelug ka mnusa mdkrang. Dhuq alang do skuwak babaw mnarux seejiq ka pucing mnangtal tunux pais do malu ka mnarux da. Dsun sapah mnangal ka tunux pais ni qdalan egaw ni siyang ni hlnma ni srgrig mqaras 1 rabi, saw saman do dsun sapah dmnudul,kiya o sapah mrhug alang aji o mduuy qsiya. Saw saman duri o pdaun peekan siyang ni kpuan dha mimah sinew, babaw na do saun pgska pttama paga kana quluh tunux smudal ni psrgan sirug tneetu gamil kdang, phiyug brqiya snalu browling ka alang nii ni smapuh smagi utux pais ka mdudul. Kari musa mdkrang mangal kkeudus muda hakaw utux Snhiyun bi rudan Truku sbiyaw ka musa mdkrang ga pusu na bi o muda hakaw utux mangal duri kneudus saw nii ka kari ruda Truku Yudaw Pisaw(91), (1)msnqbubur empkeudus kika musa mdkrang. (2) Msnhiyi (kari rudan)yaasa mha meudus duri ka qbubur kika musa mangal tunux pais. (3).Snaw: Muda Hakaw Utux siida, utux nengalan tunux pais ka weela hyaan muda Hakaw Utux mtaril dhuq tuxan. (4).Msnhiyi ka musa mdkrang. (5). Kuyuh: Muda pusu Hakaw Utux ptrima baga siida, sriyu paah hiqur ka dara, kika tduwa muda Hakaw Utux.( 6). Asi ka mkla bi tminun bitaq kla miri.
S.PHON: qu…ĺi gaja mdk…ĺaŇč **** gaja qu…ĺi mdk…ĺaŇč(maŇčal tunux pais) pusu balaj o stndańßu ka nii. pusu s…ôusa mdk…ĺaŇč ***** pusu s…ôusa mdk…ĺaŇč o (*)smijuk pkp…ôsan …ĺudan, kija ka ńßni ¶i ka…ĺi …ĺudan ni asi ka daan,(*)kksnaw balaj, kija o tt…ôumal qmp…ĺiŇčan dmbb…ĺax ni pptasan pŇčlux dsnaw nii,(*).pn…ĺuŇčan ka…ĺi, kijao paańß snńßaŇčan taxa saw nii, (*).msn…ôijiŇč bais stmaaun,(*) lmiwaq mna…ĺux m…ô…ô…ĺu a…üi ksbaan tnukuj aaŇčal lala uqun, (*)…ôuda ńßakaw utux babaw mńßuqil. musa mdk…ĺaŇč(b…ĺańß *** sŇča…ĺi ńßŇčkawas mijańß ka nińßuŇč do wada laxan ka gaja nii). gaja mdk…ĺaŇč ***** taxa bi ńßiji duma(saw sksita duku), mtńßba…ĺaw musa ka kana, mdudul o m…ĺńßug alaŇč a…üi o mduuj qsija alaŇč ńßija ps…ĺamal.(mdaka…ĺ ms…ôusa,ma…ĺańß tańßut, tmikan ni ńßmlama dsun) musa bbuju mspi ni psisil mn*, malu o musa, naqińß o …ômb…ĺinańß, muda mk…ĺabi …ôlug siida o "p…ĺgnabaw," mg…ĺbu k…üijax pdaliŇč alaŇč p…ôsan do ńß ¶ijun biji ka * …ĺisaw ni smkagul …ômpsk…ôu…ĺuj,nii o asi ka mnaŇčal tunux pais,(mlukus"s…ĺbuxan)" bsqa…ĺan puniq,buun bu…üi a…üi u…ĺi o smb…ĺaŇčan ka pais, snagan ajug ka luqi ni psaun "tn…ô…ôtu "ka tunux ni sp…ôapa …ĺisaw,"mk…ô…ôlug mujas mkl…ô…ôug ńßmdńßik"ni msqa…ĺ puniq qu…ĺi alaŇč (pxal o * tunux,mn* o * tunux pais naŇčal, ini dńßuq alaŇč ka dńßija na o saan pst…ĺuŇč plukus"s…ĺbuxan"kulaw …ôlug ka mnaŇčal tunux, pdalińß alaŇč do mn…ô…ôlug mqa…ĺas mujas mkl…ô…ôlug ka mnusa mdk…ĺaŇč. dńßuq alaŇč do skuwak babaw mna…ĺux s…ô…ô…üiq ka pu ¶iŇč mnaŇčtal tunux pais do malu ka mna…ĺux da. dsun sapańß mnaŇčal ka tunux pais ni qdalan …ôgaw ni sijaŇč ni ńßlnma ni s…ĺg…ĺig mqa…ĺas * …ĺabi, saw saman do dsun sapańß dmnudul,kija o sapańß m…ĺńßug alaŇč a…üi o mduuj qsija. saw saman du…ĺi o pdaun p…ô…ôkan sijaŇč ni kpuan dńßa mimańß sin…ôw, babaw na do saun pgska pttama paga kana quluńß tunux smudal ni ps…ĺgan si…ĺug tn…ô…ôtu gamil kdaŇč, pńßijug b…ĺqija snalu b…ĺowliŇč ka alaŇč nii ni smapuńß smagi utux pais ka mdudul. ka…ĺi musa mdk…ĺaŇč maŇčal kk…ôudus muda ńßakaw utux snńßijun bi …ĺudan t…ĺuku sbijaw ka musa mdk…ĺaŇč ga pusu na bi o muda ńßakaw utux maŇčal du…ĺi kn…ôudus saw nii ka ka…ĺi …ĺuda t…ĺuku judaw pisaw(**), (*)msnqbubu…ĺ …ômpk…ôudus kika musa mdk…ĺaŇč. (*) msnńßiji (ka…ĺi …ĺudan)jaasa mńßa m…ôudus du…ĺi ka qbubu…ĺ kika musa maŇčal tunux pais. (*).snaw: muda ńßakaw utux siida, utux n…ôŇčalan tunux pais ka w…ô…ôla ńßjaan muda ńßakaw utux mta…ĺil dńßuq tuxan. (*).msnńßiji ka musa mdk…ĺaŇč. (*). kujuńß: muda pusu ńßakaw utux pt…ĺima baga siida, s…ĺiju paańß ńßiqu…ĺ ka da…ĺa, kika tduwa muda ńßakaw utux.( *). asi ka mkla bi tminun bitaq kla mi…ĺi.
S.FORM: Quri gaya mdkrang ŚĖ™Á¶ģŤ¶ŹŚČá Gaya quri mdkrang(mangal tunux pais) pusu balay o stndahu ka nii. Pusu seusa mdkrang ŚáļŤćČÁöĄŚéüŚõ† Pusu seusa mdkrang o (1)smiyuk pkpeysan rudan, kiya ka hnici kari rudan ni asi ka daan,(2)kksnaw balay, kiya o tteumal qmpringan dmbbrax ni pptasan pnglux dsnaw nii,(3).pnrungan kari, kiyao paah snhangan taxa saw nii, (4).msneiying bais stmaaun,(5) lmiwaq mnarux meeru aji ksbaan tnukuy aangal lala uqun, (6)euda hakaw utux babaw mhuqil. musa mdkrang(brah 100 sngari hngkawas miyah ka Nihung do wada laxan ka gaya nii). Gaya mdkrang ŚáļŤćČÁöĄŤ¶ŹŚČá Taxa bi hiyi duma(saw skSita Duku), mthbaraw musa ka kana, mdudul o mrhug alang aji o mduuy qsiya alang hiya psramal.(mdakar mseusa,marah tahut, tmikan ni hmlama dsun) musa bbuyu mspi ni psisil mn3, malu o musa, naqih o embrinah, muda mkrabi elug siida o "prgnabaw," mgrbu kjiyax pdaling alang peysan do hciyun biyi ka 1 risaw ni smkagul empskeuruy,nii o asi ka mnangal tunux pais,(mlukus"srbuxan)" bsqaran puniq,buun buji aji uri o smbrangan ka pais, snagan ayug ka luqi ni psaun "tneetu "ka tunux ni speapa risaw,"mkeelug muyas mkleeug hmdhik"ni msqar puniq quri alang (pxal o 1 tunux,mn3 o 3 tunux pais nangal, ini dhuq alang ka dhiya na o saan pstrung plukus"srbuxan"kulaw elug ka mnangal tunux, pdalih alang do mneelug mqaras muyas mkleelug ka mnusa mdkrang. Dhuq alang do skuwak babaw mnarux seejiq ka pucing mnangtal tunux pais do malu ka mnarux da. Dsun sapah mnangal ka tunux pais ni qdalan egaw ni siyang ni hlnma ni srgrig mqaras 1 rabi, saw saman do dsun sapah dmnudul,kiya o sapah mrhug alang aji o mduuy qsiya. Saw saman duri o pdaun peekan siyang ni kpuan dha mimah sinew, babaw na do saun pgska pttama paga kana quluh tunux smudal ni psrgan sirug tneetu gamil kdang, phiyug brqiya snalu browling ka alang nii ni smapuh smagi utux pais ka mdudul. Kari musa mdkrang mangal kkeudus muda hakaw utux Snhiyun bi rudan Truku sbiyaw ka musa mdkrang ga pusu na bi o muda hakaw utux mangal duri kneudus saw nii ka kari ruda Truku Yudaw Pisaw(91), (1)msnqbubur empkeudus kika musa mdkrang. (2) Msnhiyi (kari rudan)yaasa mha meudus duri ka qbubur kika musa mangal tunux pais. (3).Snaw: Muda Hakaw Utux siida, utux nengalan tunux pais ka weela hyaan muda Hakaw Utux mtaril dhuq tuxan. (4).Msnhiyi ka musa mdkrang. (5). Kuyuh: Muda pusu Hakaw Utux ptrima baga siida, sriyu paah hiqur ka dara, kika tduwa muda Hakaw Utux.( 6). Asi ka mkla bi tminun bitaq kla miri.

…ĺudan ni asi ka daan,(*)kksnaw balaj, kija o tt…ôumal qmp…ĺiŇčan dmbb…ĺax ni pptasan pŇčlux dsnaw nii,(*).pn…ĺuŇčan ka…ĺi, kijao paańß snńßaŇčan taxa saw nii, (*).msn…ôijiŇč bais stmaaun,(*) lmiwaq mna…ĺux m…ô…ô…ĺu a…üi ksbaan tnukuj aaŇčal lala uqun, (*)…ôuda ńßakaw utux babaw mńßuqil. musa mdk…ĺaŇč(b…ĺańß *** sŇča…ĺi ńßŇčkawas mijańß ka nińßuŇč do wada laxan ka gaja nii). gaja mdk…ĺaŇč ***** taxa bi ńßiji duma(saw sksita duku), mtńßba…ĺaw musa ka kana, mdudul o m…ĺńßug alaŇč a…üi o mduuj qsija alaŇč ńßija ps…ĺamal.(mdaka…ĺ ms…ôusa,ma…ĺańß tańßut, tmikan ni ńßmlama dsun) musa bbuju mspi ni psisil mn*, malu o musa, naqińß o …ômb…ĺinańß, muda mk…ĺabi …ôlug siida o "p…ĺgnabaw," mg…ĺbu k…üijax pdaliŇč alaŇč p…ôsan do ńß ¶ijun biji ka * …ĺisaw ni smkagul …ômpsk…ôu…ĺuj,nii o asi ka mnaŇčal tunux pais,(mlukus"s…ĺbuxan)" bsqa…ĺan puniq,buun bu…üi a…üi u…ĺi o smb…ĺaŇčan ka pais, snagan ajug ka luqi ni psaun "tn…ô…ôtu "ka tunux ni sp…ôapa …ĺisaw,"mk…ô…ôlug mujas mkl…ô…ôug ńßmdńßik"ni msqa…ĺ puniq qu…ĺi alaŇč (pxal o * tunux,mn* o * tunux pais naŇčal, ini dńßuq alaŇč ka dńßija na o saan pst…ĺuŇč plukus"s…ĺbuxan"kulaw …ôlug ka mnaŇčal tunux, pdalińß alaŇč do mn…ô…ôlug mqa…ĺas mujas mkl…ô…ôlug ka mnusa mdk…ĺaŇč. dńßuq alaŇč do skuwak babaw mna…ĺux s…ô…ô…üiq ka pu ¶iŇč mnaŇčtal tunux pais do malu ka mna…ĺux da. dsun sapańß mnaŇčal ka tunux pais ni qdalan …ôgaw ni sijaŇč ni ńßlnma ni s…ĺg…ĺig mqa…ĺas * …ĺabi, saw saman do dsun sapańß dmnudul,kija o sapańß m…ĺńßug alaŇč a…üi o mduuj qsija. saw saman du…ĺi o pdaun p…ô…ôkan sijaŇč ni kpuan dńßa mimańß sin…ôw, babaw na do saun pgska pttama paga kana quluńß tunux smudal ni ps…ĺgan si…ĺug tn…ô…ôtu gamil kdaŇč, pńßijug b…ĺqija snalu b…ĺowliŇč ka alaŇč nii ni smapuńß smagi utux pais ka mdudul. ka…ĺi musa mdk…ĺaŇč maŇčal kk…ôudus muda ńßakaw utux snńßijun bi …ĺudan t…ĺuku sbijaw ka musa mdk…ĺaŇč ga pusu na bi o muda ńßakaw utux maŇčal du…ĺi kn…ôudus saw nii ka ka…ĺi …ĺuda t…ĺuku judaw pisaw(**), (*)msnqbubu…ĺ …ômpk…ôudus kika musa mdk…ĺaŇč. (*) msnńßiji (ka…ĺi …ĺudan)jaasa mńßa m…ôudus du…ĺi ka qbubu…ĺ kika musa maŇčal tunux pais. (*).snaw: muda ńßakaw utux siida, utux n…ôŇčalan tunux pais ka w…ô…ôla ńßjaan muda ńßakaw utux mta…ĺil dńßuq tuxan. (*).msnńßiji ka musa mdk…ĺaŇč. (*). kujuńß: muda pusu ńßakaw utux pt…ĺima baga siida, s…ĺiju paańß ńßiqu…ĺ ka da…ĺa, kika tduwa muda ńßakaw utux.( *). asi ka mkla bi tminun bitaq kla mi…ĺi.
